id.description: optional stable identifier; derived from the construct pattern by the loader when absent

construct.description: SHACL construct pattern: pseudo-Turtle snippet of the construct IRI abbreviation plus placeholders, e.g. "sh:maxInclusive {v}", "sh:property [sh:path {p}; {body}]"

position.description: position domain; injected automatically by the loader from the registry, the agent never writes it

template.description: notation template sharing placeholders with the construct pattern; contextual placeholders like {p} may appear on the template side only

source.description: locator inside the paper: definition, section, or page number, free form

connective.description: default connective for the implicit conjunction

byContext.description: optional per-context connective overrides: node-shape / property-shape -> connective

supported.description: positive list (locked design): construct IRI abbreviations whose formalization the paper covers; anything absent is rejected, and the deferred list is derived as registry minus supported minus engine-deferred
